traceEvents.name: MoE Decoder Block | Kimi-K2.5-NVFP4 | SGLang | B200 TP=8 | BS=1 ISL=4 OSL=1024

args.architecture: DeepseekV3 MLA + MoE (384 experts top-8, 1 shared expert)
args.quantization: NVFP4 (MoE experts), BF16 (attention), FP8 KV cache

args.source_code_explanation: Fused residual-add + RMSNorm at decoder layer input (hidden_size=7168, eps=1e-5). Adds the residual from the previous layer's MLP/MoE output to the current hidden states, then applies RMSNorm. First fused_add_rmsnorm in the block, called from LayerCommunicator.prepare_attn().
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2DecoderLayer.forward() [deepseek_v2.py:1763] -> LayerCommunicator.prepare_attn() [communicator.py:499] -> RMSNorm.__call__() [layernorm.py] -> FlashInfer fused_add_rmsnorm kernel

args.source_code_explanation: Fused min-latency GEMM for joint Q/KV/rope A-projection: [1,7168]->[1,2112]. Custom kernel for bs<=16 on SM>=90. Computes q_lora(1536), kv_latent(512), k_pe(64) in one pass.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2DecoderLayer.forward() [deepseek_v2.py:1770] -> DeepseekV2AttentionMLA.forward() [deepseek_v2.py:1432] -> forward_absorb_prepare() [forward_mla.py:104] -> prepare_qkv_latent() [deepseek_v2.py:1576] -> dsv3_fused_a_gemm() [sgl-kernel/csrc/gemm/dsv3_fused_a_gemm.cu]

args.source_code_explanation: RMSNorm on q_lora_rank=1536 dimension. Normalizes the compressed Q representation before Q-B projection. Runs on main stream, overlapped with KV-A norm on alt stream during CUDA graph capture.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2AttentionMLA.forward_absorb_prepare() [forward_mla.py:116-119] -> self.q_a_layernorm(q) [layernorm.py] -> FlashInfer RMSNorm kernel (main stream, overlapped with kv_a on alt stream)

args.source_code_explanation: RMSNorm on kv_lora_rank=512 dimension. Normalizes the compressed KV latent representation before it is used as the key in MLA attention. Runs on alt_stream(3488) overlapped with Q-A norm on main stream during CUDA graph capture.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2AttentionMLA.forward_absorb_prepare() [forward_mla.py:116-121] -> torch.cuda.stream(self.alt_stream): self.kv_a_layernorm(k_nope) [layernorm.py] -> FlashInfer RMSNorm kernel (alt_stream 3488)

args.source_code: cuBLAS nvjet via torch.nn.functional.linear -> forward_mla.py:212 self.q_b_proj(q)
args.source_code_explanation: Q B-projection GEMM: [1,1536]->[1,1536] (ColumnParallelLinear, TP-sharded). Expands compressed Q lora to full Q with nope+rope components for all local attention heads. Uses BF16 cuBLAS (attention weights not FP4-quantized in NVFP4 checkpoint). Grid(96,1,1) on SM100 Blackwell.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2AttentionMLA.forward_absorb_prepare() [forward_mla.py:212] -> self.q_b_proj(q)[0].view(-1, num_local_heads, qk_head_dim) -> ColumnParallelLinear.forward() [linear.py] -> torch.nn.functional.linear -> cuBLAS nvjet GEMM

args.source_code: cuBLAS nvjet via torch.bmm -> forward_mla.py:311 torch.bmm(q_nope.T, self.w_kc)
args.source_code_explanation: Absorbed W_kc batched matrix multiply: [8,1,128]x[8,128,512]->[8,1,512]. Pre-multiplies Q_nope by the absorbed K projection matrix (W_kc) to avoid explicit KV-B projection in decode. BF16 cuBLAS BMM with batch=num_local_heads=8. Grid(64,1,1) on SM100.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2AttentionMLA.forward_absorb_prepare() [forward_mla.py:311] -> torch.bmm(q_nope.transpose(0,1), self.w_kc) -> cuBLAS nvjet batched GEMM

args.full_kernel_name: void flashinfer::RopeQuantizeKernel<(bool)1, (unsigned int)16, (unsigned int)1, __nv_bfloat16, long, __nv_fp8_e4m3>(T4 *, T4 *, T4 *, T4 *, T6 *, T6 *, T6 *, T6 *, float *, T5 *, unsigned int, unsi...
args.source_code: FlashInfer RopeQuantizeKernel -> radix_attention.py -> TRT-LLM MLA backend
args.source_code_explanation: Fused RoPE application + FP8 quantization for KV cache. Applies DeepSeek YARN rotary position embedding to q_pe and k_pe, then quantizes k_pe to fp8_e4m3 for paged KV cache storage. Runs before attention and KV cache write.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2AttentionMLA.forward_absorb_core() [forward_mla.py:400-405] -> RadixAttention.forward() [radix_attention.py] -> TRT-LLM MLA backend: fused RoPE + FP8 quantize -> FlashInfer RopeQuantizeKernel

args.source_code_explanation: Writes MLA KV cache entries to paged memory. Splits the latent cache into nope(512) and rope(64) components, casts to FP8, and writes to the paged KV buffer at the appropriate cache locations. Handles boundary cases where blocks span the nope/rope dimension boundary.
args.call_chain: RadixAttention.forward() [radix_attention.py] -> set_mla_kv_buffer() [mem_cache/utils.py:99] -> Triton kernel set_mla_kv_buffer_kernel [mem_cache/utils.py:26-83]

args.source_code_explanation: SM100 fused multi-head latent attention (FMHA) decode kernel. Performs paged KV attention with Q=[q_nope_out(512)+q_pe(64)], KV cache in FP8 with page_size=64. Uses TMA and warp-specialized scheduling for Blackwell. Fuses RoPE for K within the kernel via cos_sin_cache. Grid(74,2,1) for 8 local heads x multi-CTA.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2AttentionMLA.forward_absorb_core() [forward_mla.py:406-419] -> self.attn_mqa(q_nope_out, k_nope, ..., q_rope=q_pe, k_rope=k_pe) -> RadixAttention.forward() -> TRT-LLM MLA decode -> fmhaSm100fKernel [sgl-kernel/csrc/attention/cutlass_mla_kernel.cu]

args.source_code: cuBLAS nvjet via torch.bmm -> forward_mla.py:510 torch.bmm(attn_output.T, self.w_vc)
args.source_code_explanation: Absorbed W_vc batched matrix multiply: [8,1,512]x[8,512,128]->[8,1,128]. Post-multiplies attention output by the absorbed V projection matrix (W_vc) to produce the final per-head output without explicit KV-B projection. BF16 cuBLAS BMM with batch=8. Grid(128,1,1) on SM100.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2AttentionMLA.forward_absorb_core() [forward_mla.py:510] -> torch.bmm(attn_output.transpose(0,1), self.w_vc) -> cuBLAS nvjet batched GEMM

args.source_code: cuBLAS nvjet via torch.nn.functional.linear -> forward_mla.py:583 self.o_proj(attn_bmm_output)
args.source_code_explanation: Output projection GEMM: [1,1024]->[1,7168] (RowParallelLinear, TP-sharded, reduce_results=False). Projects concatenated per-head attention output back to hidden_size. Uses BF16 cuBLAS (attention weights not FP4-quantized). Grid(112,1,1) on SM100 Blackwell.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2AttentionMLA.forward_absorb_core() [forward_mla.py:583] -> self.o_proj(attn_bmm_output) -> RowParallelLinear.forward() [linear.py] -> torch.nn.functional.linear -> cuBLAS nvjet GEMM

args.full_kernel_name: void sglang::cross_device_reduce_1stage<__nv_bfloat16, (int)8>(sglang::RankData *, sglang::RankSignals, sglang::Signal *, T1 *, int, int)
args.source_code_explanation: Custom symmetric-memory 1-stage cross-device AllReduce for attention output across TP=8. Reduces 7168-dim hidden states from o_proj output. First of two allreduces in the MoE decoder block.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2DecoderLayer.forward() [deepseek_v2.py:1784] -> LayerCommunicator.prepare_mlp() [communicator.py:665] -> tensor_model_parallel_all_reduce() [distributed.py] -> cross_device_reduce_1stage [sgl-kernel/csrc/allreduce/custom_all_reduce.cuh]

args.source_code_explanation: Fused residual-add + RMSNorm after attention (hidden_size=7168, eps=1e-5). Adds the attention output (after allreduce) to the residual, then applies post-attention RMSNorm. Second fused_add_rmsnorm in the block, called from LayerCommunicator.prepare_mlp().
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2DecoderLayer.forward() [deepseek_v2.py:1784] -> LayerCommunicator.prepare_mlp() [communicator.py:665] -> post_attention_layernorm(hidden_states, residual) [layernorm.py] -> FlashInfer fused_add_rmsnorm kernel

args.source_code_explanation: MoE router gate GEMM computing expert logits: [1,7168]x[384,7168]^T->[1,384] in float32. Custom low-latency kernel for bs<=16 with 384 experts. Grid(384,1,1) launches one threadblock per expert. Runs on alt_stream(3488) in dual-stream MoE path.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2DecoderLayer.forward() [deepseek_v2.py:1802] -> DeepseekV2MoE.forward_normal_dual_stream() [deepseek_v2.py:646] -> torch.cuda.stream(alt_stream): self.gate(hidden_states) [deepseek_v2.py:348] -> dsv3_router_gemm() [sgl-kernel/csrc/gemm/dsv3_router_gemm_float_out.cu:49]

args.full_kernel_name: void cvt_fp16_to_fp4<__nv_bfloat16, (bool)0>(int, int, const T1 *, const float *, unsigned int *, unsigned int *)
args.source_code_explanation: NVFP4 activation quantization (BF16->E2M1) before shared expert gate_up_proj GEMM. Computes per-block (16-element) scaling factors in float8_e4m3fn format and packs activations to 4-bit. First of two FP4 quant ops in the MoE block.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2MoE.forward_normal_dual_stream() [deepseek_v2.py:635] -> _forward_shared_experts(hidden_states) [deepseek_v2.py:1040] -> shared_experts.gate_up_proj(x) -> ModelOptFp4LinearMethod.apply() [modelopt_quant.py] -> scaled_fp4_quant() -> cvt_fp16_to_fp4 [nvfp4_quant_kernels.cuh:101]

args.source_code: cutlass FP4 GEMM via flashinfer mm_fp4 -> deepseek_v2.py:265 shared_experts.gate_up_proj
args.source_code_explanation: Shared expert gate+up projection FP4 GEMM: [1,7168]->[1,4096] (MergedColumnParallelLinear, tp_size=1). Uses CUTLASS SM100 FP4 (E2M1) kernel with 128x128x256 tile and (1,8,1) cluster. Produces gate(2048)+up(2048) which feed into SiLU*Mul activation. Grid(1,4,1).
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2MoE._forward_shared_experts() [deepseek_v2.py:1040] -> shared_experts.gate_up_proj(x) [deepseek_v2.py:265] -> ModelOptFp4LinearMethod.apply() [modelopt_quant.py] -> fp4_gemm() -> cutlass_scaled_fp4_mm() or flashinfer mm_fp4 -> cutlass::device_kernel<DeviceGemmFp4GemmSm100> [nvfp4_scaled_mm_sm100.cuh]

args.full_kernel_name: void tensorrt_llm::kernels::quantize_with_block_size<(tensorrt_llm::BlockScaleQuantizationType)0, __nv_bfloat16, (int)16, (bool)0>(int, int, int, int, const T2 *, const float *, unsigned int *, uns...
args.source_code_explanation: Quantizes hidden states from BF16 to FP4 with block-scale quantization for TRT-LLM MoE kernels. Uses BlockScaleQuantizationType=0 (FP4) with 16-element vector size. Produces packed FP4 tensor + float8_e4m3fn scale factors for the subsequent fused MoE GEMM1.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2MoE.forward_normal_dual_stream() [deepseek_v2.py:646-652] -> torch.cuda.stream(alt_stream): self.experts(hidden_states, topk_output) -> FlashInferTrtllmMoERunner.forward() [flashinfer_trtllm.py] -> quantize_hidden_states_fp4() [flashinfer_trtllm_moe.py:811] -> tensorrt_llm::kernels::quantize_with_block_size

args.source_code_explanation: Computes top-K expert routing with DeepSeekV3 group-biased selection. Applies e_score_correction_bias, selects top-8 of 384 experts (n_group=1, topk_group=1), computes softmax-normalized routing weights, and prepares routing indices for the fused MoE GEMM. Grid(1,1,1) for single-token decode.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2MoE.forward_normal_dual_stream() [deepseek_v2.py:647-652] -> torch.cuda.stream(alt_stream): topk -> experts -> trtllm_fp4_block_scale_moe() [flashinfer_trtllm_moe.py] -> moe::dev::routing::routingIndicesBlockKernel

args.source_code: FlashInfer TRT-LLM FP4 MoE -> flashinfer_trtllm_moe.py trtllm_fp4_block_scale_moe()
args.source_code_explanation: MoE fused GEMM1 + SwiGLU: FP4 gate+up projection for top-8 selected experts. Each expert: [1,7168]->[1,4096] (2x moe_intermediate_size=2048). Uses E2M1 (FP4) x E2M1 with FP32 accumulation and block scaling. Fuses gated SiLU activation within the kernel. Grid(4,8,1) with t128x8x512 tile config.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2MoE.forward_normal_dual_stream() [deepseek_v2.py:652] -> torch.cuda.stream(alt_stream): self.experts(hidden_states, topk_output) -> trtllm_fp4_block_scale_moe() [flashinfer_trtllm_moe.py] -> TRT-LLM FP4 MoE GEMM1 kernel (bmm_E2m1_E2m1E2m1, fused gate+up+SwiGLU)

args.source_code_explanation: Fused SiLU activation with element-wise multiplication for shared expert FFN. Computes SiLU(gate) * up from the gate_up_proj output. Input dim=4096 (gate:2048 + up:2048), output dim=2048. Uses ActivationKind::SiLU with gated=true.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2MoE._forward_shared_experts() [deepseek_v2.py:1040] -> shared_experts(hidden_states) [deepseek_v2.py:266] -> SiluAndMul.forward() [activation.py] -> act_and_mul_kernel [sgl-kernel/csrc/elementwise/activation.cu:97]

args.full_kernel_name: void cvt_fp16_to_fp4<__nv_bfloat16, (bool)0>(int, int, const T1 *, const float *, unsigned int *, unsigned int *)
args.source_code_explanation: NVFP4 activation quantization (BF16->E2M1) before shared expert down_proj GEMM. Quantizes the post-SiLU*Mul intermediate (dim=2048) to FP4. Second of two FP4 quant ops in the MoE block.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2MoE._forward_shared_experts() [deepseek_v2.py:1040] -> shared_experts.down_proj(x) [deepseek_v2.py:267] -> ModelOptFp4LinearMethod.apply() [modelopt_quant.py] -> scaled_fp4_quant() -> cvt_fp16_to_fp4 [nvfp4_quant_kernels.cuh:101]

args.source_code: FlashInfer TRT-LLM FP4 MoE -> flashinfer_trtllm_moe.py trtllm_fp4_block_scale_moe()
args.source_code_explanation: MoE fused GEMM2: FP4 down projection for top-8 selected experts. Each expert: [1,2048]->[1,7168]. Uses E2M1 input x E2M1 weight with FP32 accumulation, BF16 output. Applies routed_scaling_factor=2.827. Grid(56,8,1) with t128x8x256 tile config. Output feeds into finalizeKernel for weighted combine.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2MoE.forward_normal_dual_stream() [deepseek_v2.py:652] -> torch.cuda.stream(alt_stream): self.experts(hidden_states, topk_output) -> trtllm_fp4_block_scale_moe() [flashinfer_trtllm_moe.py] -> TRT-LLM FP4 MoE GEMM2 kernel (bmm_Bfloat16_E2m1E2m1, down projection)

args.source_code: cutlass FP4 GEMM via flashinfer mm_fp4 -> deepseek_v2.py:267 shared_experts.down_proj
args.source_code_explanation: Shared expert down projection FP4 GEMM: [1,2048]->[1,7168] (RowParallelLinear, tp_size=1, reduce_results=False). Uses CUTLASS SM100 FP4 (E2M1) kernel with 128x64x128 tile. Projects intermediate representation back to hidden_size. Grid(1,112,1).
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2MoE._forward_shared_experts() [deepseek_v2.py:1040] -> shared_experts.down_proj(x) [deepseek_v2.py:267] -> ModelOptFp4LinearMethod.apply() [modelopt_quant.py] -> fp4_gemm() -> cutlass::device_kernel<DeviceGemmFp4GemmSm100> [nvfp4_scaled_mm_sm100.cuh]

args.source_code_explanation: MoE output finalization: weighted combination of top-8 expert outputs using routing weights. Accumulates BF16 expert outputs scaled by softmax routing probabilities into the final hidden state. Grid(28,1,1) with 256 threads, processing 7168-dim output.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2MoE.forward_normal_dual_stream() [deepseek_v2.py:652] -> torch.cuda.stream(alt_stream): self.experts(hidden_states, topk_output) -> trtllm_fp4_block_scale_moe() [flashinfer_trtllm_moe.py] -> moe::dev::finalize::finalizeKernel (weighted combine of top-8 expert outputs)

args.source_code_explanation: Element-wise addition of shared expert output and routed expert output: final_hidden_states += shared_output. Combines the unfused shared expert MLP output with the scaled routed MoE expert output. Grid(7,1,1) for 7168 elements.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2MoE.forward_normal_dual_stream() [deepseek_v2.py:658-659] -> current_stream.wait_stream(alt_stream): final_hidden_states += shared_output -> torch.Tensor.__iadd__ -> at::native::vectorized_elementwise_kernel (CUDAFunctor_add)

args.full_kernel_name: void sglang::cross_device_reduce_1stage<__nv_bfloat16, (int)8>(sglang::RankData *, sglang::RankSignals, sglang::Signal *, T1 *, int, int)
args.source_code_explanation: Custom symmetric-memory 1-stage cross-device AllReduce for MoE output across TP=8. Reduces 7168-dim combined shared+routed expert output. Second of two allreduces in the MoE decoder block.
args.call_chain: DeepseekV2MoE.forward_normal_dual_stream() [deepseek_v2.py:660-665] -> tensor_model_parallel_all_reduce(final_hidden_states) [distributed.py] -> cross_device_reduce_1stage [sgl-kernel/csrc/allreduce/custom_all_reduce.cuh]
